title: cortex.audit.sandbox.<verb>.v1 data payload
description: Stub schema for cortex-sandbox-runner exec audit events. Field surface is TBD-strict — subject + timestamp are the only required keys so CORTEX_REQUIRE_ENVELOPE=1 has a target to validate against. Tighten before enforcing strict mode in production. See stacks/cortex-sandbox-runner/app/server.js → emitAuditEvent.
